An unnamed Gallo-Roman settlement and temple, located near modern Champallement-Compierre in France.

properties.alt: Settlement north of Buridava Roman fort and Vicus
properties.description: A Dacian settlement, probably of indigenous origin, lying a few kilometers north of the Roman fort and vicus known as Buridava. It may have originated the toponym.
